name: arXiv API
description: Official Atom API used by this scanner for metadata collection and version tracking.

name: Phonopy
description: Open-source package for harmonic phonon calculations, eigenvectors, symmetry analysis and thermal properties.

name: Phono3py
description: Anharmonic phonon–phonon interaction and lattice thermal-transport calculations.

name: Quantum ESPRESSO PHonon
description: Density-functional perturbation theory tools for vibrational properties and electron–phonon coupling.

name: EPW
description: Wannier-based first-principles electron–phonon calculations and transport workflows.

name: ABINIT
description: First-principles platform with DFPT, phonons, electron–phonon interactions and response functions.

name: Yambo
description: Many-body perturbation theory package for GW/BSE and excited-state properties, useful for exciton–phonon-adjacent studies.

name: Bilbao Crystallographic Server
description: Symmetry and group-theory tools useful for identifying degenerate phonon irreducible representations and selection rules.
